welcome.title: Welcome to Cclawd
welcome.description: Your AI assistant is ready to be configured

welcome.title: Welcome to Cclawd
welcome.description: Cclawd is a graphical interface for OpenClaw, allowing you to easily use AI assistants on your favorite messaging platforms.

issue.title: Environment issue detected
issue.desc: Please ensure OpenClaw is properly installed. Check the logs for details.

provider.label: Model Provider
provider.modelIdDesc: The model identifier from your provider (e.g. deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3)
provider.codePlanPresetDesc: Code Plan uses https://ark.cn-beijing.volces.com/api/coding/v3 and model ark-code-latest. Do not use /api/v3 for Code Plan traffic.
provider.storedLocally: Your API key is stored locally on your machine.

realPerson.title: Real-Person Verification
realPerson.subtitle: Enter your real name and ID card number. After face verification succeeds, Cclawd will save MFA_AUTH_API_KEY to your OpenClaw .env automatically.
realPerson.name: Real Name
realPerson.pending: Verification in progress. Waiting for scan result...
realPerson.statusFailed: Verification failed. Please retry after completing face verification.
realPerson.saved: Verification succeeded and MFA_AUTH_API_KEY was saved to .env

validation.required: Please enter both your name and ID card number.

qr.title: Scan to Verify
qr.scanHint: Please use WeChat or the Digital Identity Assistant app to scan.
qr.subtitle: Use your phone to scan the QR code and complete face verification.
qr.subtitleChecking: QR code generated. Waiting for verification result...

guide.title: Verification Flow
guide.step1: 1. Enter your real name and ID card number below.
guide.step2: 2. Start verification to generate a QR code.
guide.step3: 3. Scan the QR code on your phone and finish face verification.

channel.title: Connect a Messaging Channel
channel.subtitle: Choose a platform to connect your AI assistant to. You can add more channels later in Settings.
channel.connectedDesc: Your channel has been configured. It will connect when the Gateway starts.

installing.title: Installing Essential Components
installing.subtitle: Setting up the tools needed to power your AI assistant
installing.wait: This may take a few moments...

complete.title: Setup Complete!
complete.subtitle: Cclawd is configured and ready to use. You can now start chatting with your AI assistant.
complete.footer: You can customize skills and connect channels in Settings
